text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
One day, while Taiki Shuttle is training hard for
the upcoming Mile Championship...

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Hm? It's awful lively over there. Are they havin' a
barbecue or something?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Sure enough, there appears to be a group of
reporters crowded together. On closer
inspection...

text_block_list.name: Reporter A
text_block_list.text:
Your latest performance was nothing short of
fantastic!

text_block_list.name: Reporter B
text_block_list.text:
An absolutely magnificent display! Especially in a
situation like that, where you couldn't have
imagined you'd win!

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
What do you mean, I couldn't have imagined I'd
win? There's no such race in this world.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
As the Empress, I exemplify perfection in all
situations. I simply did exactly what needed to be
done.

text_block_list.name: Reporter A
text_block_list.text: I'd expect no less from you! What an intimidat—I mean, impressive way of looking at things!

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Will that be all the questions for today? If so, I'll
be taking my leave. This is cutting into my
training time.

text_block_list.name: Reporter B
text_block_list.text: Please, just a moment! Air Groove!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Wow, she's so popular! That's Air Groove for ya!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: I'm real proud to have her as a friend!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Air Groove has performed exceptionally well in a
number of G1 races.

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
You said it! I ain't lettin' anybody get in the way
of me becoming Umamusume of the Year—not
even my friends!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Okay, back to training! I gotta focus and run like I
really mean it!
choice_data_list: (Hm? Suddenly, I've got a bad feeling...)

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Well, look what cat dragged in! Howdy, Suzuka!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Taiki loses focus immediately, leaving me to
chase after her.

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: You training, Suzuka? Why don't I join ya?

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Huh? But...

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: You're running in the Mile Championship, right?

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
You bet! It's the one race where I can go toe to
toe with the seniors!

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Then unfortunately, I can't train with you.

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: What?! Say it ain't so, Suzuka! Why not?

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
Well, I've decided to enter the Mile
Championship myself...

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: No way! Really?! You're gonna be there too?!

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Yes. That's why... Hm, how should I put this?

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: You see, I've been rethinking the way I run.

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Huh... Not sure I follow.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
I'd like to try out different approaches... in many
different races.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Thinking back, Silence Suzuka scored a win
against Air Groove with her "runaway" style.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Perhaps this is one of the things she's discovered
on her journey.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
...I'm almost there. I feel like I just need a little
more to get within reach.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
This time, I want to experience the fast pace of a
sprint in the Mile Championship.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I'm starting to understand Silence Suzuka's
mindset.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
In any case, we've got no choice but to err on the
side of caution.
choice_data_list: The seniors aren't your only rivals.
The seniors aren't your only rivals.

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
You said it! I ain't plannin' on losing, Suzuka! That
number one spot is mine!

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Hehe, I feel the exact same way. I mean to win.

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Woohoo, I'm feelin' pumped now! Let's put this
energy into training!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
You ready, Suzuka? Time for one lap at full
speed!

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: ...Wait, what?!

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
Hold on, Taiki. Were you listening to me? I said I
can't train with my rivals—

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Aw, forget about that! Let's run, Suzuka!

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: You're kidding, right?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Thus, we've learned that Silence Suzuka will be
competing in the Mile Championship along with
Taiki Shuttle.
